StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT MIN(t.title) AS movie_title FROM job.company_name AS cn, job.keyword AS k, job.movie_companies AS mc, job.movie_keyword AS mk, job.title AS t WHERE cn.country_code ='[us]' AND k.keyword ='character-name-in-title' AND cn.id = mc.company_id AND mc.movie_id = t.id AND t.id = mk.movie_id AND mk.keyword_id = k.id AND mc.movie_id = mk.movie_id
